name: TestIso11783IL_OPSelectColorMap
title: TestIso11783IL_OPSelectColorMap
tables: long TestIso11783IL_OPSelectColorMap( dbNode node, dword colorMapID );

The function selects a color map object. A Select Color Map command is sent to the Virtual Terminal. Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.
node Simulation node to apply the function.
colorMapID object ID of the color map objects
0: function has been executed successfully <0: an error has occurred, see error codes
